probes.name: audit-kms-reachable
probes.description: KMS Describe key on the audit-encryption key. Fails if KMS unreachable — restricted-field writes will queue for KmsEncryptAuditFieldsJob but read paths refuse decryption.

probes.name: audit-chain-verified-recently
probes.description: For enterprise tenancy: chain verification ran within last 8 days (weekly + 24h grace).

probes.name: audit-cold-rotation-lagging
probes.description: No rows past 400d hot window remain unrotated (365d + 35d grace).
